results.rendered_html:
avṛka (3. a + vṛka)
1〉 adj. nicht gefährdend, harmlos, treu; ungefährdet, sicher: svarvajjyotiravṛkaṃ naśīmahi  ṚV. 10,36,3 . 1,55,6 . sakhā 4,16,18 . vṛdhaḥ 15,3 . avṛkatamo narāṃ nṛpātā 1,174,10 . 6,48,18 . chardiḥ 1,48,15 . 8,27,4 . varūthaiḥ 7,19,7 . 74,6 . 6,2,2 . 4,8 . 10,144,5 .
— 2〉 n. Sicherheit, Ruhe: sacāvahe yadavṛkaṃ purā cit  ṚV. 7,88,5 . avṛke kṣeṣyantaḥ 6,4,4 . 1,30,13 . 7,66,8 .

results.rendered_html:
avṛka a.
1 Free from danger,
(pb) safe.
2 Not hurting, inoffensive, true.
3 Free from one who obscures.
— kaṃ
1 Safety, peace, security.
2 Quiet, repose.
